DESCRIPTION:
Refers to accompanying own children and/or dependent adults to places.

Own children refers to children from the household or family members who are related, to a specified degree, through blood, adoption or marriage.
Dependent adults refers to persons suffering any physical or mental illness or any disability or impairment who require assistance or help from other person to undertake daily activities including older persons.
This does not include adults who require temporary assistance.

Examples:
- Accompanied my child to the doctor
- Accompanied my child to drawing/sports class
- Accompanied my grandfather to the doctor
